_comment: Datasets the Σ₀ flywheel MAY ingest for editing priors. Each is LICENSE-GATED: ingest is refused unless redistributable===true AND the license is on the permissive allowlist (CC-BY / CC-BY-SA / CC0 / public-domain / GPL / MIT / Apache). Anything NonCommercial (NC), NoDerivatives (ND), proprietary, or with an unclear/unknown license is refused — feature extraction is a derivative use, so ND/unknown is unsafe. Ingest = download → analyze → extract priors → DELETE the source video; only features are kept. ALWAYS verify the real license text at the source before flipping redistributable to true.

datasets.name: gamingvideoset
datasets.title: GamingVideoSET — gaming video quality dataset
datasets.notes: 24 raw 1080p/30fps gaming clips + 576 encoded MP4s, built for video-QUALITY (QoE/codec) research. Gated OFF: (1) the license is not clearly stated and related datasets are CC BY-NC-ND — NoDerivatives makes feature extraction unsafe; (2) the download is a Box folder, not automatable; (3) even if licensed it is raw gameplay with no facecam, so it would only inform motion/cut/pacing priors. Confirm the real license before enabling.

datasets.name: blender-open-movies
datasets.title: Blender Foundation open movies
datasets.notes: CC-BY animated shorts (not gaming) — a clean, redistributable example that PASSES the gate. Real cuts/motion/pacing for editing priors; fetched via the flywheel downloader (yt-dlp) then deleted.
